# Video Generation - Text to Video

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/textToVideo`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/textToVideo/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-BbR1eXbu.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-text-to-video`
- `query-text-to-video-single`
- `query-text-to-video-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/text2video`
- `/v1/videos/text2video/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Video Generation - Text to Video",zh:"文生视频"},endpoints:[{id:"create-text-to-video",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/text2video",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Please note that in order to maintain naming consistency, the original model field has been changed to model_name, so in the future, please use this field to specify the version of the model that needs to be called. At the same time, we keep the behavior forward-compatible. If you continue to use the original model field, it will not have any impact on the interface call, there will not be any exception, which is equivalent to the default behavior when model_name is empty (i.e., call the V1 model).",zh:"请您注意，为了保持命名统一，原 model 字段变更为 model_name字段，未来请您使用该字段来指定需要调用的模型版本。同时，我们保持了行为上的向前兼容，如您继续使用原 model字段，不会对接口调用有任何影响、不会有任何异常，等价于 model_name为空时的默认行为（即调用V1模型）"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authorization",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-v1",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-v1","kling-v1-6","kling-v2-master","kling-v2-1-master","kling-v2-5-turbo","kling-v2-6"]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Positive text prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"negative_prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Negative text prompt",zh:"负向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"sound",type:"string",required:!1,default:"off",description:{en:"Is sound generated simultaneously when generating videos",zh:"生成视频时是否同时生成声音"},enum:["on","off"],notes:[{en:"- Only V2.6 and subsequent versions of the model supports this parameter",zh:"- 仅V2.6及后续版本模型支持此参数"}]},{name:"cfg_scale",type:"float",required:!1,default:"0.5",description:{en:"The degree of freedom for generating video; the larger the value, the smaller the degree of freedom of the model",zh:"生成视频的自由度；值越大，模型的自由度越小"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 1]",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 1]"},{en:"- kling-v2.x models do not support this parameter",zh:"- kling-v2.x 模型不支持此参数"}]},{name:"mode",type:"string",required:!1,default:"std",description:{en:"Video generation mode",zh:"视频生成模式"},enum:["std","pro"],notes:[{en:"- std: Standard mode, basic mode, cost-effective",zh:"- 其中std：标准模式（标准），基础模式，性价比高"},{en:"- pro: Expert mode (high quality), high performance mode, better video quality",zh:"- 其中pro：专家模式（高品质），高表现模式，生成视频质量更佳"},{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"camera_control",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Terms of controlling camera movement (if not specified, the model will intelligently match based on the input text/images)",zh:"控制相机运动的条款（如不指定，模型将根据输入的文本/图片智能匹配）"},notes:[{en:"- Support varies by model version and video mode. See [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap) for details.",zh:"- 不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见[能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}],children:[{name:"type",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Predefined camera movements type",zh:"预定义的相机运动类型"},enum:["simple","down_back","forward_up","right_turn_forward","left_turn_forward"],notes:[{en:'- simple: Simple camera movement, you can choose one of six options in "config"',zh:'- simple：简单运镜，此类型下可在"config"中六选一进行运镜'},{en:'- down_back: Camera descends and moves backward ➡️ Pan down and zoom out. The config parameter must be set to "None" under this type.',zh:"- down_back：镜头下压并后退 ➡️ 下移拉远，此类型下config参数无需填写"},{en:'- forward_up: Camera moves forward and tilts up ➡️ Zoom in and pan up. The config parameter must be set to "None" under this type.',zh:"- forward_up：镜头前进并上仰 ➡️ 推进上移，此类型下config参数无需填写"},{en:'- right_turn_forward: Rotate right then move forward ➡️ Rotate right and advance. The config parameter must be set to "None" under this type.',zh:"- right_turn_forward：先右旋转后前进 ➡️ 右旋推进，此类型下config参数无需填写"},{en:'- left_turn_forward: Rotate left then move forward ➡️ Rotate left and advance. The config parameter must be set to "None" under this type.',zh:"- left_turn_forward：先左旋并前进 ➡️ 左旋推进，此类型下config参数无需填写"}]},{name:"config",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Contains 6 fields, used to specify the camera's movement or change in different directions",zh:"包含 6 个字段，用于指定相机在不同方向上的移动或变化"},notes:[{en:"- Required when type is simple, not required for other types",zh:"- 当运镜类型指定simple时必填，指定其他类型时不填"},{en:"- Choose 1 of the following 6 parameters, only one can be non-zero, others must be 0",zh:"- 以下参数6选1，即只能有一个参数不为0，其余参数为0"}],children:[{name:"horizontal",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Horizontal, controls the camera's movement along the horizontal axis (translation along the x-axis)",zh:"水平方向，控制相机沿水平轴的移动（沿 x 轴平移）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]"},{en:"- Negative value indicates a translation to the left, positive value indicates a translation to the right",zh:"- 负值表示向左平移，正值表示向右平移"}]},{name:"vertical",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Vertical, controls the camera's movement along the vertical axis (translation along the y-axis)",zh:"垂直方向，控制相机沿垂直轴的移动（沿 y 轴平移）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]"},{en:"- Negative value indicates a downward translation, positive value indicates an upward translation",zh:"- 负值表示向下平移，正值表示向上平移"}]},{name:"pan",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Pan, controls the camera's rotation in the horizontal plane (rotation around the y-axis)",zh:"摇摄，控制相机在水平面内的旋转（绕 y 轴旋转）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]"},{en:"- Negative value indicates rotation to the left around y-axis, positive value indicates rotation to the right around y-axis",zh:"- 负值表示绕y轴向左旋转，正值表示绕y轴向右旋转"}]},{name:"tilt",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Tilt, controls the camera's rotation in the vertical plane (rotation around the x-axis)",zh:"俯仰，控制相机在垂直面内的旋转（绕 x 轴旋转）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]"},{en:"- Negative value indicates rotation down around x-axis, positive value indicates rotation up around x-axis",zh:"- 负值表示绕x轴向下旋转，正值表示绕x轴向上旋转"}]},{name:"roll",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Roll, controls the camera's roll (rotation around the z-axis)",zh:"翻滚，控制相机的翻滚（绕 z 轴旋转）"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]"},{en:"- Negative value indicates counterclockwise rotation around z-axis, positive value indicates clockwise rotation around z-axis",zh:"- 负值表示绕z轴逆时针旋转，正值表示绕z轴顺时针旋转"}]},{name:"zoom",type:"float",required:!1,description:{en:"Zoom, controls the camera's focal length change, affecting the distance of the field of view",zh:"缩放，控制相机的焦距变化，影响视野距离"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [-10, 10]",zh:"- 取值范围：[-10, 10]"},{en:"- Negative value indicates longer focal length, smaller field of view; positive value indicates shorter focal length, larger field of view",zh:"- 负值表示焦距变长、视野范围变小，正值表示焦距变短、视野范围变大"}]}]}]},{name:"aspect_ratio",type:"string",required:!1,default:"16:9",description:{en:"The aspect ratio of the generated video frame (width:height)",zh:"生成视频帧的宽高比（宽:高）"},enum:["16:9","9:16","1:1"]},{name:"duration",type:"string",required:!1,default:"5",description:{en:"Video Length, unit: s (seconds)",zh:"视频长度，单位：秒"},enum:["5","10"]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Callback notification URL for this task result.
```
